text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, May 31. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Yum, that sounds delicious! Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. I've got the schedule covered. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that researching rover power systems in depth. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Space science and tech is a great focus. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. I've got the schedule covered. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
